name: Leonardo Cat Dry Food Kitten – Poultry 2.5KG
shortDescription: Leonardo Kitten Poultry Dry Food is a premium complete cat food specially formulated for kittens up to one year of age and nursing queens. Made with high-quality fresh poultry meat and carefully selected natural ingredients, this nutrient-rich recipe supports healthy growth, strong immunity, optimal digestion, and overall wellbeing during the most important stages of development.
description: Inspired by the natural diet of cats as true carnivores, LEONARDO® Kitten provides highly digestible animal protein and essential nutrients needed for healthy muscles, brain development, strong bones, and a shiny coat. Why Choose LEONARDO® Kitten Poultry Dry Food? High Fresh Meat Content for Growing Kittens Made with 30% fresh poultry meat and 27% dried poultry protein, this premium kitten formula delivers high-quality animal protein with excellent biological value. This helps support: Healthy muscle growth Strong body development High energy levels for active kittens Because of its nutrient density, kittens require smaller feeding portions while still receiving complete daily nutrition. Supports Healthy Brain & Vision Development Enriched with marine zooplankton (krill), fish meal, and omega fatty acids, LEONARDO® Kitten helps support cognitive development, healthy eyesight, and nervous system function during early growth stages. Gentle Digestion for Sensitive Kittens The carefully balanced recipe includes rice, whey powder, brewers’ yeast, and chicory inulin to support healthy digestion and balanced intestinal flora. These ingredients help improve nutrient absorption and digestive comfort in young kittens. Healthy Skin & Shiny Coat Chia seeds and poultry fat provide essential omega-3 and omega-6 fatty acids that nourish the skin and promote a soft, glossy coat. Ideal for Nursing Queens The high-energy, nutrient-rich formula is also suitable for pregnant and nursing cats, helping support increased nutritional demands during pregnancy and lactation. Key Benefits of LEONARDO® Kitten Poultry Dry Food Premium kitten food for kittens up to 1 year Suitable for pregnant and nursing queens Made with fresh poultry meat (30%) High animal protein content for healthy growth Supports strong muscles and healthy development Omega fatty acids for healthy skin and shiny coat Gentle digestion with prebiotics and natural fibres Supports brain and eye development Highly digestible and nutrient-rich recipe No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives Main Ingredients LEONARDO Kitten Poultry Dry Food contains premium-quality ingredients including: Fresh poultry meat (30%) Dried poultry protein (27%) Rice Poultry fat Poultry liver hydrolysate Malted rye Dried eggs Whey powder Krill (marine zooplankton) Fish meal from sea fish Brewers’ yeast Chia seeds Chicory inulin Carob pods Nutritional Support for Healthy Kittens This balanced kitten formula provides essential nutrients that help support: Healthy immune system Strong bones and teeth Brain development Digestive health Healthy coat condition Daily vitality and growth Perfect Start for Your Kitten LEONARDO Kitten Poultry Dry Food delivers premium daily nutrition designed to help kittens grow into healthy, active, and happy adult cats. Give your kitten the best nutritional foundation with LEONARDO® Kitten Poultry Dry Food complete premium nutrition made for healthy growth and lifelong wellbeing.
